 REPORT OF FOREIGN PRIVATE ISSUER

 Material Contained in this Report: 

 I. 
 The registrant&#8217;s Unaudited Condensed Consolidated Financial Statements for the periods ended
September 30, 2025, prepared in accordance with IFRS, which materially conform to the Consolidated Financial Statements filed with the Japanese-language first half Securities Report, as filed with the Director of the Kanto Local Finance Bureau
on November 13, 2025. 

 SIGNATURES 

 Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed
on its behalf by the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized. 

 Toyota Motor Corporation
